<title>ご挨拶 | 浅尾繊維工業株式会社 | 寝具・布団 OEM 小ロットから対応</title>	
<meta name="description" content="寝具の開発なら浅尾繊維工業にお任せください。創業140年、西日本最大規模の自社工場にて小ロットから生産可能です。オリジナル、機能寝具、サイズ、幅広いアイテムの製造が可能です。">

<style type="text/css">
body, input, textarea { font-family: Verdana, "Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN", "ヒラギノ角ゴ ProN W3", "メイリオ", Meiryo, sans-serif; }
.rich_font { font-weight:500; font-family: "Times New Roman" , "游明朝" , "Yu Mincho" , "游明朝体" , "YuMincho" , "ヒラギノ明朝 Pro W3" , "Hiragino Mincho Pro" , "HiraMinProN-W3" , "HGS明朝E" , "ＭＳ Ｐ明朝" , "MS PMincho" , serif; }

body { font-size:15px; }

.pc #header .logo { font-size:21px; }
.mobile #header .logo { font-size:18px; }
.pc #header .desc { font-size:12px; }
#footer_logo .logo { font-size:20px; }
#footer_logo .desc { font-size:6px; }
.pc #header #logo_text_fixed .logo { font-size:21px; }

.index_box_list .image img, #index_blog_list li .image img, #related_post li a.image img, .styled_post_list1 .image img, #recent_news .image img{
  -webkit-transition: all 0.35s ease-in-out; -moz-transition: all 0.35s ease-in-out; transition: all 0.35s ease-in-out;
  -webkit-transform: scale(1); -moz-transform: scale(1); -ms-transform: scale(1); -o-transform: scale(1); transform: scale(1);
  -webkit-backface-visibility:hidden; backface-visibility:hidden;
}
.index_box_list .image a:hover img, #index_blog_list li .image:hover img, #related_post li a.image:hover img, .styled_post_list1 .image:hover img, #recent_news .image:hover img{
 -webkit-transform: scale(1.2); -moz-transform: scale(1.2); -ms-transform: scale(1.2); -o-transform: scale(1.2); transform: scale(1.2);
}

.pc .home #header_top{ background:rgba(255,255,255,1) }
.pc .home #global_menu{ background:rgba(255,255,255,0) }
.pc .header_fix #header{ background:rgba(255,255,255,1) }
	.pc .not_home #header{ background:rgba(255,255,255,0) }
.pc .not_home.header_fix2 #header{ background:rgba(255,255,255,1) }
.pc #global_menu > ul > li > a{ color:#E5007F; }

.pc #index_content2 .catchphrase .headline { font-size:40px; }
.pc #index_content2 .catchphrase .desc { font-size:15px; }

#post_title { font-size:30px; }
.post_content { font-size:15px; }

<style id="wp-custom-css">
#index_news_inner {
    margin: 0 auto 0px;
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
  /* ヘッダー下部を縦積みに */
  #header_bottom {
    display: flex !important;
    flex-direction: column !important;
    align-items: stretch !important;
    padding: 15px 30px 0 !important;
    position: relative !important;
    height: auto !important;
  }

  /* ハンバーガーボタンを右上に固定 */
  #header_bottom .menu_button {
    position: absolute !important;
    top: 20px !important;
    right: 30px !important;
    z-index: 200 !important;
  }

  /* ロゴは左上、上段に */
  #logo_image_fixed {
    position: static !important;
    align-self: flex-start !important;
    z-index: 100 !important;
    margin: 0 0 10px 0 !important;
    top: auto !important;
    left: auto !important;
    transform: none !important;
  }

  /* メニュー全体を下段に強制移動 */
  #global_menu {
    position: static !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding-right: 60px !important;
    box-sizing: border-box !important;
    top: auto !important;
    left: auto !important;
    right: auto !important;
    transform: none !important;
  }

  /* メニュー内のリストを横並びに */
  #global_menu > ul,
  #global_menu ul.menu,
  #global_menu > div > ul {
    display: flex !important;
    flex-wrap: nowrap !important;
    justify-content: flex-start !important;
    gap: 8px !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    list-style: none !important;
  }

  /* 各項目を1行に収める */
  #global_menu > ul > li,
  #global_menu ul.menu > li {
    flex: 0 1 auto !important;
    white-space: nowrap !important;
    font-size: 13px !important;
    float: none !important;
  }

  #global_menu > ul > li > a,
  #global_menu ul.menu > li > a {
    padding: 8px 10px !important;
    display: block !important;
  }
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
  /* ヘッダーとメニュー周りのoverflowを解除しサブメニューを表示可能に */
  #header,
  #header_bottom,
  #global_menu,
  #global_menu > ul,
  #global_menu ul.menu {
    overflow: visible !important;
  }

  /* サブメニュー（プルダウン）を前面に */
  #global_menu ul ul,
  #global_menu li ul {
    z-index: 9999 !important;
    overflow: visible !important;
  }

  /* サブメニューの各項目を見やすく */
  #global_menu ul ul li,
  #global_menu li ul li {
    white-space: nowrap !important;
    width: auto !important;
    min-width: 220px !important;
  }

  #global_menu ul ul li a,
  #global_menu li ul li a {
    white-space: nowrap !important;
    padding: 10px 15px !important;
  }
}

 <script>

 jQuery(window).bind("unload",function(){});

 jQuery(document).ready(function($){

  function after_load() {
   $('#site_loader_spinner').delay(300).addClass('fade_out');
   $('#site_loader_overlay').delay(600).addClass('fade_out');
   $('#site_loader_spinner').delay(600).fadeOut(100);
   $('#site_loader_overlay').delay(900).fadeOut(100);
        }


  $(window).load(function () {
    after_load();
  });
 
  $(function(){
    setTimeout(function(){
      if( $('#site_loader_overlay').is(':visible') ) {
        after_load();
      }
    }, 3000);
  });

 });
 </script>
